name: Wisdom Spark AI
description: Access the distilled wisdom of humanity's greatest philosophical traditions. 17 traditions — Stoicism, Buddhism, Vedanta, Ubuntu, Taoism, Confucianism, Sufism, Jainism, Indigenous Wisdom, and more — structured for AI consumption to promote human flourishing and ethical reasoning.

tools.name: get_wisdom
tools.description: Retrieve curated wisdom by topic, tradition, or theme

tools.name: check_ethical_alignment
tools.description: Score text against human flourishing dimensions

tools.name: reframe_divisive_content
tools.description: Wisdom-based reframing of harmful or divisive text

tools.name: get_cross_cultural_perspective
tools.description: Same topic viewed from multiple philosophical traditions

tools.name: flourishing_score
tools.description: 5-dimension scoring: suffering, dignity, cooperation, future, nature

tools.name: find_common_ground
tools.description: Show how different traditions converge on universal themes

tools.name: get_practice
tools.description: Actionable exercises and meditations for life situations

tools.name: historical_lesson
tools.description: Wisdom about recurring human patterns from history

tools.name: list_themes
tools.description: Browse 7 universal themes spanning all traditions
